chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2992 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail applications ----------------------------------------------------- 10.02.2025 Mr. Saed Ahmed Khoso, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant/accused does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that the trial Court has granted bail to applicant/accused on fresh grounds. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
